text: Being here, I am enveloped by a sense of curiosity and anticipation. The glass walls and modern design evoke a world devoted to learning and innovation—elements of research and discovery are ever-present. The R+D display stirs thoughts about humanity’s drive to question, create, and improve. Surrounded by symbols of progress, I feel inspired, but also aware of the brisk, artificial nature of this environment. There is a mix of awe and caution, as the space celebrates both potential and the unknown.
